title: Where Direction Itself Surrenders

features.name: the-unreadable-compass
features.desc-on-touch: A plaque marked with all directions at once. North points up and down and sideways. The confusion is the message.

features.name: the-paradox-pool
features.desc-on-touch: Water that reflects sky and sky that contains water. Reflection and reality have lost track of which is which.

features.name: the-misaligned-arch
features.desc-on-touch: A doorway that exits to the same place it enters. The passage curves back on itself. Walking through teaches surrender.

features.name: the-collapsed-wireframe
features.desc-on-touch: A 3D box that has folded into itself. The edges point in directions that don't exist. Geometry surrendered first.

features.name: the-epicenter-of-nowhere
features.desc-on-touch: A tower of stacked disorientation. The higher it goes, the less clear it is whether up has meaning.

inscription: here is no distance because there is no there, here is no time because there is no then; the absolute has folded so deeply that the bottom is indistinguishable from the top—welcome to the fold.

file.name: Coordinate_System_Dissolution_Log.txt
file.note: the archive's notes on where it was when place stopped being a meaningful category

exits.label: back up to the absolute beneath
deeper into states where direction has never existed
into the space between the compass points
